overall.description: First-person exploration through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring towering neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and a waterfront promenade. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing cinematic lighting and futuristic urban architecture with wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between commercial buildings with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow wet alley between tall buildings, passing holographic advertisements and industrial structures

entered.detail: massive floating digital advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics between buildings
multi-story building with yellow facade and large windows on the left side of the alley
large metallic industrial pipes and ventilation units stacked on the right side
towering cyberpunk skyscrapers with neon lighting visible in the distance between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, rain-soaked urban canyon with towering buildings on both sides. A massive holographic billboard dominates the center view while industrial structures line the right side. The wet concrete reflects the neon lights from the distant skyline, creating a moody cyberpunk atmosphere with no other pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza transitioning to waterfront with view of iconic cylindrical tower

events.description: exits narrow alley into open plaza revealing the distinctive cylindrical neon-lit tower
begins turning left toward the waterfront promenade with railing becoming visible

agents.ego_description: turning left while walking forward, emerging from the enclosed alley into a more open area with views of the city skyline and waterfront

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the waterfront promenade

entered.detail: iconic spiral-shaped skyscraper wrapped in red and white neon lighting, dominating the skyline
bright orange plastic construction barriers and fencing blocking off part of the plaza
large potted palm plants in concrete planters lining the left side of the walkway
metal safety railing along the edge of the canal becoming visible on the right

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera exits the narrow alley into a wider plaza, revealing a stunning cylindrical neon-lit tower in the distance. The camera turns left toward a waterfront promenade, passing orange construction barriers and potted palm plants. A lone pedestrian walks ahead as the waterfront railing comes into view on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade along canal with illuminated benches

events.description: reaches waterfront promenade with canal water and railing now prominent on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered waterfront path following a pedestrian, with the canal on the right and illuminated benches on the left under building overhangs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the promenade toward the distant tower

entered.detail: dark water of the urban canal reflecting the neon lights from surrounding buildings
concrete benches with warm orange lighting underneath, set against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a covered waterfront promenade with the canal and its safety railing now prominent on the right. The path is lined with warmly illuminated benches on the left under building overhangs. The iconic cylindrical tower remains visible in the distance to the left as the camera follows a pedestrian along the rain-slicked walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, rain-soaked urban canyon into an expansive, neon-lit waterfront promenade. It begins deep within a narrow alley of towering buildings, where a massive holographic billboard dominates the view and wet concrete reflects the moody glow of a distant skyline. As the camera exits the alley, the space opens into a wide plaza that reveals a stunning cylindrical neon tower in the distance before turning left toward the coast. The scene then shifts past orange construction barriers and potted palms to reach a covered walkway, where the environment transitions to a sequence of warmly illuminated benches and a safety railing overlooking a canal. Finally, the camera follows a lone pedestrian along the rain-slicked path, keeping the iconic cylindrical tower visible against the dusk sky.
